messages.content: make a descriptive story set in the dune 2021 movie universe. paul atreides, played by timothee chalamet, is on caladan and decides to take a bath in a river. describe him in the buff. he farts in the water. describe the smell and the size/amount of fart bubbles. corpses of fish that died from the horrible smell start to surface. he collects them for dinner.
